name: Source 0120 — Complete LLM Fallback Failure
narrative_summary: All 16 volumes (spanning abs_chapters 1-396+) returned LLM fallback stubs with zero confidence. No extractable narrative mechanics, craft patterns, state progression, turning points, reader rewards, or arc functions exist. Volume-level aggregation is impossible. Chapter-card batch aggregation yields no reusable patterns. This source represents a total extraction failure and must not be treated as a valid book profile.

name: Source 0120 Volume Bundle — No Aggregatable Content
narrative_summary: Sixteen volume cards (volumes 1-16) all report identical failure modes: LLM fallback across all chapters, zero confidence, empty state_progression arrays, empty turning_points arrays, empty reusable_mechanisms arrays, and null or empty craft_profile objects. No arc function determinable. No dominant engine identifiable. No story state traceable. No craft observations available. Source requires complete manual re-processing before inclusion in any downstream craft analysis or series study.
